testCase.name: Register with valid data
testCase.objective: Verify ​​​​​that a new user can successfully register with valid data.
testCase.precondition:
User is on home page 
User is logged out (no active session)
E-mail is not registered before

step.description: Click "My Account" button in top right
Click the checkbox next to "I have read and agree to the Privacy Policy"

step.expectedResult:
Account is created successfully
The user is redirected to the confirmation page 
Message appears "Your Account Has Been Created!"

testCase.name: Error messages appear inline below the relevant field
testCase.objective: Verify that error messages are displayed inline directly below their relevant field upon failed submission.
testCase.precondition: • User is on the registration page

step.description: Leave the privacy policy checkbox unchecked

step.expectedResult: Error messages appear directly below each required field.

testCase.name: Registration page layout and fields render correctly
testCase.objective: Verify that the registration page displays all fields, labels, and elements correctly.
testCase.precondition: User is on the registration page

step.expectedResult: All fields (First Name, Last Name, Email, Password, Newsletter checkbox, Privacy Policy checkbox, Continue button) are visible, properly labeled, and correctly aligned with no broken elements.

testCase.name: Newsletter checkbox is unchecked by default
testCase.objective: Verify that the newsletter checkbox is unchecked by default when the registration page loads.
testCase.precondition: User is on the registration page

step.description: Observe the Newsletter checkbox without interacting with it
step.expectedResult: The Newsletter checkbox is unchecked by default.

testCase.name: Password field masks input
testCase.objective: Verify that the password field masks entered characters.
testCase.precondition: User is on the registration page

step.expectedResult: Entered characters are masked and not visible in plain text.

testCase.name: Form retains entered data after failed submission
testCase.objective: Verify that the form retains previously entered data after a failed submission.
testCase.precondition: User is on the registration page

step.description: Fill in First Name, Last Name, Email, and Password fields with valid data

step.expectedResult: All previously entered field data is retained and not cleared after the failed submission.

testCase.name: Login with valid credentials
testCase.objective: Verify that user can login with a registered E-mail and password
testCase.precondition:
User is on login page
User is logged out (no active session)
User has already registered with E-mail and password

step.description: Fill the E-mail field with a valid registered E-mail
Fill the password field with the correct registered password

step.expectedResult:
Login is successful and session is created
User is redirected to "My Account" page

testCase.name: Logout successfully
testCase.objective: Verify that user can logout successfully after sign in
testCase.precondition: User is logged in and session is active

step.description: Click on "My Account" in the header to access its drop down menu

step.expectedResult: user is redirected to the logout page

User is logged out successfully and session is terminated
User is redirected to home page

testCase.name: Login with an empty E-mail
testCase.objective: Verify that user can't login without an E-mail
testCase.precondition:
User is on login page
User is logged out (no active session)
User has already registered with E-mail and password

step.description: Fill the password field with the correct registered password

step.expectedResult:
Login is not successful and no session is created
User stays on the login page
Warning message shows: "Warning: No match for E-Mail Address and/or Password."

search criteria box, category filter box, product compare button, view mode switch, sort by dropdown, items-per-page dropdown, and product results grid/list. No overlapping, broken, or misaligned elements.

testCase.name: Clicking a category with no subcategories navigates to its product list
testCase.objective: Verify that clicking a top-level category with no subcategories navigates directly to that category's product list page.
testCase.precondition:
• User is on any page with the category navigation bar visible
  • Selected category has no subcategories (e.g., MP3 Players)

step.description: Click on "MP3 Players" in the top navigation bar
step.expectedResult: User is navigated to the MP3 Players category page, displaying all products under that category with breadcrumb showing Home > MP3 Players.

testCase.name: Hovering a category with subcategories opens the subcategory dropdown
testCase.objective: Verify that hovering over a top-level category with subcategories displays the dropdown with its subcategories.

• User is on any page with the category navigation bar visible
  • Selected category has subcategories (e.g., Components)

step.description: Hover over "Components" in the top navigation bar
step.expectedResult: A dropdown appears displaying all subcategories under Components with their product counts, plus a "Show All Components" link.

testCase.name: Clicking "Show All [Category]" navigates to all products in that category and subcategories

• User is on any page with the category navigation bar visible
  • Selected category has subcategories

step.description: <u>Hover over "Components" in the top navigation bar</u>

step.expectedResult: User is navigated to the Components category page displaying products from Components and all its subcategories (Mice and Trackballs, Monitors, Printers, Scanners, Web Cameras).

testCase.name: Add to Cart and Remove buttons are visible and clickable for each product
testCase.objective: Verify that Add to Cart and Remove buttons are visible and respond to click interaction for each product on the comparison page.
testCase.precondition: • User is on the Product Comparison page with at least one product

step.description: Observe the bottom row of the comparison table
Click the Add to Cart button for any product
Click the Remove button for any product
step.expectedResult: Both buttons are visible, properly styled, and respond to click interaction for each product column.

testCase.name: Comparison page layout renders correctly
testCase.objective: Verify that the comparison page displays all elements correctly without rendering issues.
testCase.precondition: • User is on the Product Comparison page with at least two products

step.description: Observe the full comparison page layout
step.expectedResult: All elements display correctly — breadcrumb, page title, product columns, attribute rows, images, and action buttons. No overlapping, broken, or misaligned elements.

testCase.name: Breadcrumb displays correctly on comparison page
testCase.objective: Verify that the breadcrumb trail displays correctly on the comparison page.
testCase.precondition: • User is on the Product Comparison page

step.description: Observe the breadcrumb at the top of the page
step.expectedResult: Breadcrumb displays Home > Product Comparison correctly.

testCase.name: Notification appears when adding product to comparison with navigation option
testCase.objective: Verify that a notification appears after adding a product to the comparison list, with an option to navigate to the comparison page.
testCase.precondition: User is on any product page or category page.

step.description: Click the compare icon on any product
step.expectedResult: A notification appears confirming the product was added to the comparison list, including a clickable link or button that navigates the user to the Product Comparison page

testCase.name: Add single product to cart and view in cart page
testCase.objective: Verify that a user can add a single product to the cart and view it correctly on the cart page.
testCase.precondition: User is on any product page.

step.description: Enter quantity in the quantity field
Click the cart icon in the header

step.expectedResult: Cart page displays the added product with correct name, model, quantity, unit price, and total.

testCase.name: Add multiple products to cart
testCase.objective: Verify that a user can add multiple different products to the cart and all appear correctly.
testCase.precondition: User is logged in and on the storefront.

step.description: Navigate to a different product page

step.expectedResult: Both products appear in the cart with correct details and the subtotal reflects the combined price of both items.

testCase.name: Update product quantity in cart
testCase.objective: Verify that a user can update the quantity of a product in the cart.
testCase.precondition: User has at least one product in the cart.

step.description: Clear the quantity field for any product

step.expectedResult: Product quantity updates to the new value. Total price for that item and cart total recalculate correctly.

testCase.name: Remove product from cart
testCase.objective: Verify that a user can remove a product from the cart.
testCase.precondition: User has at least two products in the cart.

step.description: Click the remove button for any product
step.expectedResult: Product is removed from the cart. Cart totals recalculate correctly. If all items are removed, an empty cart message displays.

testCase.name: Apply valid coupon code
testCase.objective: Verify that a valid coupon code can be applied to the cart and the discount reflects correctly.
testCase.precondition: User has at least one product in the cart and has a valid coupon code.

step.expectedResult: Discount is applied and reflected in the cart total. A confirmation message appears.

testCase.name: Apply valid gift certificate
testCase.objective: Verify that a valid gift certificate can be applied to the cart and the discount reflects correctly.
testCase.precondition: User has at least one product in the cart and has a valid gift certificate code.

step.description: Enter a valid gift certificate code

step.expectedResult: Gift certificate amount is applied and reflected in the cart total. A confirmation message appears.

testCase.name: Estimate shipping and taxes with valid address
testCase.objective: Verify that the shipping and tax estimation works correctly with a valid address.
testCase.precondition: User has at least one product in the cart.

step.expectedResult: Available shipping options and estimated costs are displayed correctly.

testCase.name: Proceed to checkout from cart page
testCase.objective: Verify that clicking the Checkout button from the cart page navigates the user to the checkout page.
testCase.precondition: User has at least one product in the cart.

step.expectedResult: User is navigated to the checkout page.

testCase.name: Continue shopping from cart page
testCase.objective: Verify that clicking "Continue Shopping" navigates the user back to the storefront.
testCase.precondition: User is on the cart page.

step.expectedResult: User is navigated back to the storefront homepage or previous page.

testCase.name: View cart from header mini-cart dropdown
testCase.objective: Verify that the mini-cart dropdown displays correctly when clicked from the header.
testCase.precondition: User has at least one product in the cart.

step.description: Click the cart icon in the header
step.expectedResult: Mini-cart dropdown appears showing all cart items with product name, reward points (if applicable), quantity, price, subtotal, eco tax, VAT, total, View Cart and Checkout links.

testCase.name: Navigate to checkout from header mini-cart dropdown
testCase.objective: Verify that clicking "Checkout" in the mini-cart dropdown navigates to the checkout page.
testCase.precondition: User has at least one product in the cart.

step.description: Click the cart icon in the header

step.expectedResult: User is navigated to the checkout page.

testCase.name: Cart persists after logout and login
testCase.objective: Verify that cart items are retained after the user logs out and logs back in.
testCase.precondition: User is logged in and has at least one product in the cart.

step.description: Note the products currently in the cart
Log back in with the same credentials

step.expectedResult: All previously added products are still present in the cart with correct quantities and prices.

testCase.name: Reward points display correctly for eligible products
testCase.objective: Verify that reward points are displayed correctly for eligible products in the cart.
testCase.precondition: User has an eligible product in the cart.

step.description: Observe the reward points displayed below the product name
step.expectedResult: Reward points are displayed correctly below the product name for eligible products.

testCase.name: Apply invalid coupon code
testCase.objective: Verify that the system rejects an invalid coupon code and displays an appropriate error message.
testCase.precondition: User has at least one product in the cart.

step.expectedResult: System displays an error message indicating the coupon code is invalid and no discount is applied.

testCase.name: Apply expired coupon code
testCase.objective: Verify that the system rejects an expired coupon code and displays an appropriate error message.
testCase.precondition: User has at least one product in the cart.

step.expectedResult: System displays an error message indicating the coupon code has expired and no discount is applied.

testCase.name: Apply invalid gift certificate
testCase.objective: Verify that the system rejects an invalid gift certificate and displays an appropriate error message.
testCase.precondition: User has at least one product in the cart.

step.description: Enter an invalid gift certificate code

step.expectedResult: System displays an error message indicating the gift certificate is invalid and no discount is applied.

testCase.name: Update product quantity to 0
testCase.objective: Verify that the system handles updating a product quantity to 0 in the cart.
testCase.precondition: User has at least one product in the cart.

step.description: Clear the quantity field for any product

step.expectedResult: System either removes the product from the cart or displays an error indicating quantity must be at least 1.

testCase.name: Update product quantity to negative number
testCase.objective: Verify that the system prevents updating a product quantity to a negative number.
testCase.precondition: User has at least one product in the cart.

step.description: Clear the quantity field for any product

step.expectedResult: System displays an error and does not update the quantity to a negative value.

testCase.name: Update product quantity exceeding available stock
testCase.objective: Verify that the system handles updating a product quantity beyond available stock.
testCase.precondition: User has at least one product in the cart.

step.description: Clear the quantity field for any product
Enter a quantity exceeding available stock

step.expectedResult: System displays a warning indicating the requested quantity is not available and does not process the update.

testCase.name: Estimate shipping with invalid addressv
testCase.objective: Verify that the system handles an invalid address input in the shipping estimator.
testCase.precondition: User has at least one product in the cart.

step.expectedResult: System displays an error or no shipping options are returned, with an appropriate message.

testCase.name: Access cart as guest with no items
testCase.objective: Verify that accessing the cart as a guest with no items displays an appropriate empty cart message.
testCase.precondition: User is not logged in and has no items in the cart.

step.expectedResult: Cart page displays an appropriate message indicating the cart is empty.

testCase.name: Mini-cart dropdown displays correct item count, prices, subtotal, eco tax, VAT and total
testCase.objective: Verify that the mini-cart dropdown displays all cart summary information correctly.
testCase.precondition: User has at least two products in the cart.

step.description: Click the cart icon in the header
Observe all displayed information in the dropdown
step.expectedResult: Dropdown displays correct item count, each product with name and price.

testCase.name: Cart page displays correct product image, name, model, unit price and total per item
testCase.objective: Verify that each cart item displays its correct details on the cart page.
testCase.precondition: User has at least one product in the cart.

step.expectedResult: Each product displays the correct image, name, model, unit price, and calculated total matching quantity multiplied by unit price.

testCase.name: Out of stock warning displays correctly for unavailable products
testCase.objective: Verify that products marked as unavailable display the out of stock warning correctly on the cart page.
testCase.precondition: User has an out of stock product in the cart.

step.description: Observe the warning banner and the product name
step.expectedResult: A red warning banner displays at the top of the page. The out of stock product name is marked with *** indicator.

testCase.name: Sub-total, eco tax, VAT and total calculate and display correctly
testCase.objective: Verify that all cart totals calculate and display correctly.
testCase.precondition: User has at least two products in the cart.

step.expectedResult: Sub-total displays , Eco Tax displays , VAT displays, Total displays.

testCase.name: Total weight displays correctly in cart page title
testCase.objective: Verify that the total weight of cart items is displayed correctly in the cart page title.
testCase.precondition: User has at least one product in the cart.

step.expectedResult: Cart page title displays "Shopping Cart" followed by the correct total weight of all items in parentheses.

testCase.name: Estimate Shipping, Coupon Code and Gift Certificate sections are collapsible and expand correctly
testCase.objective: Verify that the three accordion sections expand and collapse correctly on the cart page.
testCase.precondition: User is on the cart page.

step.expectedResult: Each section expands to reveal its input fields when clicked and collapses when clicked again.

testCase.name: Remove button is visible and clickable for each cart item
testCase.objective: Verify that the remove button is visible and responds to click interaction for each cart item.
testCase.precondition: User has at least one product in the cart.

step.description: Observe the remove button for each product row
step.expectedResult: Remove button is visible, properly styled in red, and responds to click interaction for each cart item.

testCase.name: Cart page layout renders correctly
testCase.objective: Verify that the cart page displays all elements correctly without rendering issues.
testCase.precondition: User has at least one product in the cart.

step.expectedResult: All elements display correctly — breadcrumb, page title with weight, product table with all columns, totals section, accordion sections, Continue Shopping and Checkout buttons. No overlapping, broken, or misaligned elements.

testCase.name: Checkout and Continue Shopping buttons are visible and clickable
testCase.objective: Verify that the Checkout and Continue Shopping buttons are visible and respond to click interaction on the cart page.
testCase.precondition: User is on the cart page.

step.description: Observe the bottom of the cart page
step.expectedResult: Both Checkout and Continue Shopping buttons are visible, clearly labeled, and respond to click interaction.

testCase.name: Edit account information with valid data
testCase.objective: Verify that a user can successfully update their account information with valid data.
testCase.precondition: User is logged in and on the My Account page.

step.description: Update the first name field
Update the last name field

step.expectedResult: Account information is updated successfully and a confirmation message appears.

testCase.name: Change password with valid current and new password
testCase.objective: Verify that a user can successfully change their password with valid credentials.
testCase.precondition: User is logged in and on the My Account page.

step.expectedResult: Password is changed successfully and a confirmation message appears.

testCase.name: Add new address to address book
testCase.objective: Verify that a user can add a new address to their address book.
testCase.precondition: User is logged in and on the My Account page.

step.description: Fill in all required address fields

step.expectedResult: New address is saved and appears in the address book with a confirmation message.

testCase.name: Edit existing address in address book
testCase.objective: Verify that a user can edit an existing address in their address book.
testCase.precondition: User is logged in and has at least one saved address in the address book.

step.expectedResult: Address is updated successfully and the changes are reflected in the address book.

testCase.name: Delete address from address book
testCase.objective: Verify that a user can delete an address from their address book.
testCase.precondition: User is logged in and has at least two saved addresses in the address book.

step.expectedResult: Address is removed from the address book and the list updates accordingly.

testCase.name: Subscribe to newsletter from My Account
testCase.objective: Verify that a user can subscribe to the newsletter from the My Account page.
testCase.precondition: User is logged in and currently unsubscribed from the newsletter.

step.expectedResult: Newsletter subscription is updated and a confirmation message appears.

testCase.name: View order history
testCase.objective: Verify that a user can view their order history from the My Account page.
testCase.precondition: User is logged in and has at least one previous order.

step.expectedResult: Order history page displays all previous orders with correct order details including order ID, date, status, and total.

testCase.name: View reward points balance
testCase.objective: Verify that a user can view their reward points balance from the My Account page.
testCase.precondition: User is logged in and has reward points associated with their account.

step.expectedResult: Reward points page displays the correct current balance and points history.

testCase.name: Edit account information with empty first name
testCase.objective: Verify that the system prevents saving account information when the first name field is empty.
testCase.precondition: User is logged in and on the Edit Account Information page.

step.expectedResult: System displays an error indicating the first name field is required and does not save the changes.

testCase.name: Edit account information with invalid email
testCase.objective: Verify that the system prevents saving account information when an invalid email is entered.
testCase.precondition: User is logged in and on the Edit Account Information page.

step.expectedResult: System displays an error indicating a valid email is required and does not save the changes.

testCase.name: Change password with incorrect current password
testCase.objective: Verify that the system prevents password change when the current password is incorrect.
testCase.precondition: User is logged in and on the Change Password page.

step.expectedResult: System displays an error indicating the current password is incorrect and does not update the password.

testCase.name: Change password with new password below minimum length
testCase.objective: Verify that the system prevents setting a new password below the minimum allowed length.
testCase.precondition: User is logged in and on the Change Password page.

step.description: Enter new password below minimum length

step.expectedResult: System displays an error indicating the password does not meet the minimum length requirement.

testCase.name: Change password with new password above maximum length
testCase.objective: Verify that the system prevents setting a new password above the maximum allowed length.
testCase.precondition: User is logged in and on the Change Password page.

step.description: Enter new password above maximum length

step.expectedResult: System displays an error indicating the password exceeds the maximum length requirement.

testCase.name: Change password with mismatched new and confirm password
testCase.objective: Verify that the system prevents password change when the new password and confirm password do not match.
testCase.precondition: User is logged in and on the Change Password page.

step.description: Enter a different value in confirm password field

step.expectedResult: System displays an error indicating the passwords do not match and does not update the password.

testCase.name: Add address with empty required fields
testCase.objective: Verify that the system prevents saving a new address when required fields are left empty.
testCase.precondition: User is logged in and on the New Address page.

step.expectedResult: System displays errors for all empty required fields and does not save the address.

testCase.name: My Account page displays all sections and links correctly
testCase.objective: Verify that the My Account page displays all sections and their links correctly.
testCase.precondition: User is logged in and on the My Account page.

step.description: Observe the full My Account page
step.expectedResult: All four sections display correctly — My Account (Edit account information, Change password, Modify address book, Modify wish list), My Orders (View order history, Subscriptions, Downloads, Reward Points, Return requests, Transactions), My Affiliate Account (Edit affiliate information, Custom tracking code), Newsletter (Subscribe/unsubscribe). All links are visible and clickable.

testCase.name: Password fields mask input on change password form
testCase.objective: Verify that all password fields on the change password form mask entered characters.
testCase.precondition: User is logged in and on the Change Password page.

step.description: Click on the current password field and type any characters
Click on the new password field and type any characters
Click on the confirm password field and type any characters
step.expectedResult: All three password fields mask entered characters and do not display them in plain text.

testCase.name: My Account page layout renders correctly
testCase.objective: Verify that the My Account page displays all elements correctly without rendering issues.
testCase.precondition: User is logged in and on the My Account page.

step.description: Observe the full My Account page layout
step.expectedResult: All sections, headings, and links are properly aligned, styled, and visible with no overlapping, broken, or misaligned elements. Breadcrumb displays Home > Account correctly.

testCase.name: Order history displays correct order details
testCase.objective: Verify that the order history page displays correct details for each order.
testCase.precondition: User is logged in and has at least one previous order.

step.expectedResult: Each order displays the correct order ID, date, payment status, shipping status, and total amount

testCase.name: Complete checkout as guest
testCase.objective: Verify that a user can complete the checkout process as a guest without registering or logging in.
testCase.precondition: User has at least one product in the cart and is not logged in.

step.description: Fill in all required billing fields
Select Cash on Delivery as payment method

step.expectedResult: Order is placed successfully. Order success page displays with a unique order ID and confirmation message.

testCase.name: Complete checkout with required billing fields only
testCase.objective: Verify that checkout can be completed with only the required billing fields filled, leaving optional fields empty.
testCase.precondition: User has at least one product in the cart.

testScript.details:
1. Navigate to checkout
  2. Select Guest Checkout
  3. Click "Continue"
  4. Fill in required fields only, leave Company and Address 2 empty
  5. Click "Continue"
  6. Select shipping method
  7. Click "Continue"
  8. Select payment method
  9. Click "Continue"
  10. Click "Confirm Order"


Test Data:
First Name: Ahmed
Last Name: Hassan
Address 1: 123 Main Street
City: Cairo
Postcode: 12345
Country: Egypt
Region: Cairo
Email: ahmed.test@gmail.com
Company: (empty)
Address 2: (empty)


Expected result
Order is placed successfully with no errors related to optional empty fields.

testCase.name: Complete checkout with same billing and delivery address
testCase.objective: Verify that checkout can be completed when the billing and delivery address are set to the same address.
testCase.precondition: User has at least one product in the cart.

testScript.details:
Steps:
  1. Navigate to checkout
  2. Select Guest Checkout
  3. Click "Continue"
  4. Fill in required billing fields
  5. Ensure "My delivery and billing addresses are the same" checkbox is checked
  6. Click "Continue"
  7. Select shipping method
  8. Click "Continue"
  9. Select payment method
  10. Click "Continue"
  11. Click "Confirm Order"

Test Data:
First Name: Ahmed
Last Name: Hassan
Address 1: 123 Main Street
City: Cairo
Postcode: 12345
Country: Egypt
Region: Cairo
Email: ahmed.test@gmail.com


Expected result
Order is placed successfully. Delivery address matches billing address in the order summary.

testCase.name: Complete checkout with different billing and delivery address
testCase.objective: Verify that checkout can be completed when billing and delivery addresses are different.
testCase.precondition: User has at least one product in the cart.

testScript.details:
Steps:
  1. Navigate to checkout
  2. Select Guest Checkout
  3. Click "Continue"
  4. Fill in billing fields
  5. Uncheck "My delivery and billing addresses are the same"
  6. Click "Continue"
  7. Fill in different delivery address fields
  8. Click "Continue"
  9. Select shipping method
  10. Click "Continue"
  11. Select payment method
  12. Click "Continue"
  13. Click "Confirm Order"


Test Data:
Billing Address: 123 Main Street, Cairo, Egypt
Delivery Address: 456 Second Street, Alexandria, Egypt


Expected result
(step 13):
Order is placed successfully. Order summary reflects the correct separate billing and delivery addresses.

step.expectedResult: Order success page displays with a unique order ID and a confirmation message indicating the order was placed successfully.

testCase.name: Complete checkout and verify order appears in admin panel
testCase.objective: Verify that a successfully placed order appears correctly in the admin panel order management section.
testCase.precondition: User has completed checkout and received an order ID.

testScript.details:
Steps:
  1. Note the order ID from the order confirmation page
  2. Log in to the admin panel
  3. Navigate to Sales → Orders
  4. Search for the order using the order ID


Test Data:
Order ID: (ID received from order confirmation page)


Expected result
(step 4):
Order appears in the admin panel with correct customer details, order status, date, and total amount matching what was placed on the storefront.

testCase.name: Complete checkout with empty first name
testCase.objective: Verify that the system prevents proceeding past billing details when the first name field is empty.
testCase.precondition: User has at least one product in the cart and is on the billing details step.

testScript.details:
Steps:
  1. Navigate to checkout
  2. Select Guest Checkout
  3. Click "Continue"
  4. Leave first name field empty
  5. Fill in all other required billing fields
  6. Click "Continue"
Test Data:
First Name: (empty)
Last Name: Hassan
Address 1: 123 Main Street
City: Cairo
Postcode: 12345
Country: Egypt
Region: Cairo
Email: ahmed.test@gmail.com
Expected result
(step 6):
System displays an error indicating the first name field is required and does not proceed to the next step.

testCase.name: Complete checkout with minimum first name below boundary (1 character)
testCase.objective: Verify that the system prevents proceeding past billing details when the first name is below the minimum allowed length.
testCase.precondition: User has at least one product in the cart and is on the billing details step.

testScript.details:
Steps:
  1. Navigate to checkout
  2. Select Guest Checkout
  3. Click "Continue"
  4. Enter a single character in the first name field
  5. Fill in all other required billing fields
  6. Click "Continue"
Test Data:
First Name: A
Last Name: Hassan
Address 1: 123 Main Street
City: Cairo
Postcode: 12345
Country: Egypt
Region: Cairo
Email: ahmed.test@gmail.com
Expected result
(step 6):
System displays an error indicating the first name does not meet the minimum length requirement and does not proceed to the next step.

testCase.name: Complete checkout without selecting shipping method
testCase.objective: Verify that the system prevents proceeding past the shipping method step without selecting a shipping option.
testCase.precondition: User has completed billing details and is on the shipping method step.

testScript.details:
Steps:
  1. Navigate to the shipping method step
  2. Do not select any shipping method
  3. Click "Continue"
Expected result
(step 3):
System displays an error indicating a shipping method must be selected and does not proceed to the next step.

testCase.name: Complete checkout without selecting payment method
testCase.objective: Verify that the system prevents proceeding past the payment method step without selecting a payment option.
testCase.precondition: User has completed billing and shipping steps and is on the payment method step.

testScript.details:
Steps:
  1. Navigate to the payment method step
  2. Do not select any payment method
  3. Click "Continue"
Expected result
(step 3):
System displays an error indicating a payment method must be selected and does not proceed to the next step.

testCase.name: Complete checkout with invalid Visa card number
testCase.objective: Verify that the system rejects an invalid Visa card number during payment.
testCase.precondition: User has completed billing and shipping steps and is on the payment method step.

testScript.details:
Steps:
  1. Select Visa as payment method
  2. Enter an invalid card number
  3. Enter valid expiry and CVV
  4. Click "Continue"
Test Data:
Card Number: 1234567890123456
Expiry: 12/26
CVV: 123
Expected result
(step 4):
System displays an error indicating the card number is invalid and does not proceed to order confirmation.

testCase.name: Complete checkout with expired Visa card
testCase.objective: Verify that the system rejects an expired Visa card during payment.
testCase.precondition: User has completed billing and shipping steps and is on the payment method step.

testScript.details:
Steps:
  1. Select Visa as payment method
  2. Enter valid card number
  3. Enter expired expiry date
  4. Enter valid CVV
  5. Click "Continue"
Test Data:
Card Number: 4111111111111111
Expiry: 01/20
CVV: 123
Expected result
(step 5):
System displays an error indicating the card has expired and does not proceed to order confirmation.

testCase.name: Complete checkout with invalid CVV
testCase.objective: Verify that the system rejects an invalid CVV during payment.
testCase.precondition: User has completed billing and shipping steps and is on the payment method step.

testScript.details:
Steps:
  1. Select Visa as payment method
  2. Enter valid card number and expiry
  3. Enter invalid CVV
  4. Click "Continue"
Test Data:
Card Number: 4111111111111111
Expiry: 12/26
CVV: 99
Expected result
(step 4):
System displays an error indicating the CVV is invalid and does not proceed to order confirmation.

testCase.name: Checkout page displays guest and returning customer options correctly
testCase.objective: Verify that the first checkout step displays both Guest Checkout and Returning Customer options correctly.
testCase.precondition: User has at least one product in the cart and is not logged in.

testScript.details:
Steps:
  1. Navigate to the cart page
  2. Click "Checkout"
Expected result
(step 2):
Checkout page displays both "Guest Checkout" and "Returning Customer" options clearly with the ability to select between them.

testCase.name: Billing details form displays all required and optional fields correctly
testCase.objective: Verify that the billing details form displays all expected fields correctly.
testCase.precondition: User is on the billing details step of checkout.

testScript.details:
Steps:
  1. Observe the billing details form
Expected result
(step 1):
Form displays all fields correctly — First Name, Last Name, Company (optional), Address 1, Address 2 (optional), City, Postcode, Country, Region/State, Email, and the "My delivery and billing addresses are the same" checkbox.

testCase.name: Required field indicators are visible on billing details form
testCase.objective: Verify that required fields are visually marked before submission attempt.
testCase.precondition: User is on the billing details step of checkout.

testScript.details:
Steps:
  1. Observe the billing details form without interacting with any field
Expected result
(step 1):
All required fields display visual indicators (e.g., asterisk) distinguishing them from optional fields.

testCase.name: Delivery details form displays correctly when different address is selected
testCase.objective: Verify that the delivery details form appears correctly when the user unchecks the same billing and delivery address option.
testCase.precondition: User is on the billing details step of checkout.

testScript.details:
Steps:
  1. Uncheck "My delivery and billing addresses are the same" checkbox
  2. Observe the delivery details form
Expected result
(step 2):
Delivery details form appears with the same fields as the billing form, properly labeled and aligned with no rendering issues.

testCase.name: Shipping method step displays available options correctly
testCase.objective: Verify that the shipping method step displays all available shipping options correctly.
testCase.precondition: User has completed billing details and is on the shipping method step.

testScript.details:
Steps:
  1. Observe the shipping method step
Expected result
(step 1):
All available shipping options are displayed with their names and costs clearly visible. At least one option is available for selection.

testCase.name: Payment method step displays available payment options correctly
testCase.objective: Verify that the payment method step displays all available payment options and the order comments field correctly.
testCase.precondition: User has completed billing and shipping steps and is on the payment method step.

testScript.details:
Steps:
  1. Observe the payment method step
Expected result
(step 1):
All available payment methods are displayed clearly. Order comments field is visible and accessible below the payment options.

testCase.name: Order summary displays correct products, quantities, prices and totals
testCase.objective: Verify that the order confirmation step displays a correct and complete order summary before the user confirms.
testCase.precondition: User has completed all checkout steps and is on the order review step.

testScript.details:
Steps:
  1. Observe the order summary on the confirmation step
Expected result
(step 1):
Order summary displays correct product names, quantities, unit prices, subtotal, shipping cost, taxes, and total. Selected shipping and payment methods are also displayed correctly.

testCase.name: Order confirmation page displays correct order ID and success message
testCase.objective: Verify that the order confirmation page displays a unique order ID and a clear success message after order placement.
testCase.precondition: User has successfully placed an order.

testScript.details:
Steps:
  1. Observe the order confirmation page after clicking "Confirm Order"
Expected result
(step 1):
Page displays a unique order ID, a clear success message confirming the order was placed, and relevant next steps or links for the customer.

testCase.name: Checkout progress indicator displays current step correctly
testCase.objective: Verify that the checkout progress indicator updates correctly to reflect the current step.
testCase.precondition: User is navigating through the checkout steps.

testScript.details:
Steps:
  1. Observe the progress indicator on each checkout step
Expected result
(step 1):
Progress indicator correctly highlights the current step and shows completed steps as the user advances through checkout.

testCase.name: Error messages display inline below relevant fields on billing formVerify that error messages appear inline directly below their relevant fields on failed billing submission.
testCase.objective: Verify that error messages appear inline directly below their relevant fields on failed billing submission.
testCase.precondition: User is on the billing details step of checkout.

testScript.details:
Steps:
  1. Leave all required fields empty
  2. Click "Continue"
Expected result
(step 2):
Error messages appear directly below each empty required field, not as popups or at the top of the page only.

testCase.name: Form retains entered data after failed billing submission
testCase.objective: Verify that previously entered billing data is retained after a failed submission attempt.
testCase.precondition: User is on the billing details step of checkout.

testScript.details:
Steps:
  1. Fill in some billing fields with valid data
  2. Leave one required field empty
  3. Click "Continue"
Test Data:
First Name: Ahmed
Last Name: Hassan
Address 1: 123 Main Street
City: Cairo
Email: (empty)
Expected result
(step 3):
All previously entered field data is retained and not cleared after the failed submission.
